props.name: title
props.description: The headline — what went wrong, in plain language.

props.name: description
props.description: Optional secondary line — detail or next step.

props.name: status
props.description: Feedback status driving the default icon's color and glyph.

props.name: headingLevel
props.description: Heading level for the title, so it fits the surrounding document outline.

props.name: actionLabel
props.description: Recovery button label (e.g. "Try again"). Omit to render no button.

props.name: onAction
props.description: Called when the recovery button is pressed.
